practice.name: Problem 17 (2019 AMC 12A)
practice.statement: Let Sk denote the sum of the kth powers of the roots of the polynomial x³ + ax² + bx + c. In particular, S₁ = -a, S₂ = a² - 2b, and S₃ = -a³ + 3ab - 3c. Let a, b, c be real numbers such that for k = 1, 2, 3, Sk = 3^k. What is a + b + c?

practice.name: Problem 7 (2008 AIME II)
practice.statement: Let r, s, and t be the three roots of the equation x³ - 15x² + 74x - 120 = 0. Find r²s + rs² + r²t + rt² + s²t + st².

practice.name: Problem 9 (2003 AIME II)
practice.statement: Consider the polynomials x² + ax + b and x² + px + q. Given that a and b are the roots of x² + px + q = 0, find a² + b² in terms of p and q.
